metadata.title: GardenOS — Smart garden & robot mowing
metadata.description: mygardenos.com: digitized gardens and robot mowing subscriptions.

home.pointCloudCaption: This will be your garden's digital file
home.headline: Your garden, digitized. Your lawn care, automated.
home.sub: The more people subscribe, the lower the price for everyone. Let's get robot lawn mowing to $29/month — together.
home.crowdfundingTitle: Let's get robot lawn mowing to $29/month — together
home.crowdfundingSubtitle: As more members join, everyone unlocks lower pricing.

col1.title: Your garden gets its own digital file
col1.body: See boundaries, key areas, and what’s happening over time—so decisions are simple and surprises are rare.

col2.title: Robot mows on schedule. You just relax.
col2.body: Set it and forget it. Regular mowing keeps things tidy without the last‑minute scramble before guests arrive.

col3.title: One yard or ten properties — same simple setup
col3.body: Whether you have one property or ten, you get the same consistent setup, visibility, and results.

prototype.title: Want to see the robot mow? Come in person or watch live
prototype.body: We'll run public mowing demos, boundary tests, and live walkthroughs. Add your name now — we'll email you as soon as time and place are confirmed.

registerBlock.title: Join free now and lock in your early-bird pricing

about.metaDescription: Why we built GardenOS, the mowing problems we solve, what we're building, and our $29/month robot mowing goal.
about.title: Who We Are & Why We Built This
about.origin: Grass grows back every week. A lawn mowing service costs $60+ per visit — that's $800 a year without thinking about it. We're a small team in Auckland who think robots can do this better and cheaper. The more people join, the lower the price for everyone. Our goal: robot lawn mowing for $29/month.

mission.title: What we're building
mission.body: 3D scanning to map your garden. Robots to mow it regularly. Collective pricing to get the cost down to $29/month.

vision.title: Our goal
vision.body: Every home in New Zealand with a garden — no more mowing stress, no more overpaying.

p1.title: Mowing costs too much and needs rebooking every time
p1.body: Every new gardener needs a full briefing. No record of your garden — everything from memory.

p2.title: Manual mowing is unreliable
p2.body: Grass grows fast in spring, last-minute bookings are expensive, and buying your own machine means maintenance.

p3.title: You paid, but you don't know if it was done
p3.body: You paid, and they showed up — but was it actually done right? No photos, no record, no way to hold anyone accountable.

v1.title: Your garden data belongs to you
v1.body: The robot works in your garden. Safety first, and you have full control of all data.

v2.title: Transparent pricing, no hidden fees
v2.body: Your subscription price is clear upfront. Lock it in when you join — it won't go up.

v3.title: Your feedback shapes what we build
v3.body: We're early stage. What you tell us directly decides what we do next.

cta.title: Want a robot mowing your lawn?
cta.body: Join free now — first 200 members get a professional 3D garden scan and lock in their early price.

participate.metaDescription: Three ways to join GardenOS: register free, book a garden scan, join a live mowing demo — earlier is cheaper.
participate.title: Three ways to join — the earlier, the cheaper
participate.lead: Homeowners, property operators, and technical partners can all contribute—the paths below turn your signal into roadmap decisions.

step1.title: Register free, lock in your price
step1.body: Join the waitlist for price-drop alerts, events, and your early-bird rate.

step2.title: Book your free garden scan
step2.body: First 200 members can book a professional 3D scan—slots and timing confirmed by email.

step3.title: Join a live mowing demo
step3.body: Watch the robot mow in public sessions—we’ll send RSVP and watch links when dates are set.

participate.ctaBody: RSVP for the next public test, or create a membership to hold launch perks and notifications.

live.metaDescription: Watch the robot mow live, catch replays, and read what’s new for GardenOS public tests.
live.title: Watch the robot mow — live
live.lead: We run open prototype tests on a rolling schedule. Register once, and we’ll notify you the moment a date is confirmed.
live.windowBody: No date locked yet. When the next session is confirmed, we’ll share the RSVP link, what we’re testing, and how to watch.
live.windowNote: If you register, you’ll get notified when it’s official. If you can’t make it live, we’ll post the recap and replay link here.
live.channelsTitle: How to watch and download assets

ch1.title: Live stream
ch1.body: Public sessions include multi-camera streams and captions—join five minutes early for the safety briefing.

ch2.title: Watch replay
ch2.body: Edited replays and written recaps will be posted within 48 hours, including what was tested and any known limitations.

ch3.title: What's new
ch3.body: After each session, we share what changed, what worked, and what we're still figuring out.

live.bannerBody: Create a membership and enable email alerts to get RSVP and watch links the moment a schedule drops.

register.metaDescription: First 200 members get a professional garden scan. Sign up with your email.
register.title: Join free — first 200 members get a professional garden scan
register.lead: Share how we should reach you; scan slots, pricing, and schedules will be confirmed by email.

b1.title: Be the first to know when prices drop
b1.body: Get an email heads-up when we lower prices or adjust plans.

b2.title: Priority access to free garden scans
b2.body: Hear first when complimentary professional scan slots open.

b3.title: Lock in your early-bird price — forever
b3.body: Early-bird pricing stays with your account per published terms.

register.placeholderScenario: Garden type, rough size, or what you want to explore
register.successBody: We've received your details and will email you as soon as prices drop or events are confirmed.
register.submitError: We could not submit your registration right now. Please try again.
register.submitMissingConfig: Registration is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
